// GeneratedAuthorizationLookup.g.cs
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System;

namespace ZeroAlloc.Mediator.Authorization
{
    internal static class GeneratedAuthorizationLookup
    {
        private static readonly string[] EmptyPolicies = global::System.Array.Empty<string>();

        public static string[] GetPoliciesFor<TRequest>()
        {
            var t = typeof(TRequest);
            if (t == typeof(global::DoStuff)) return new string[] { "Admin" };
            return EmptyPolicies;
        }

        public static string[] GetPoliciesForType(global::System.Type t)
        {
            if (t == typeof(global::DoStuff)) return new string[] { "Admin" };
            return EmptyPolicies;
        }

        public static global::ZeroAlloc.Authorization.IAuthorizationPolicy Resolve(string name, global::System.IServiceProvider sp)
        {
            switch (name)
            {
                case "Admin": return (global::ZeroAlloc.Authorization.IAuthorizationPolicy)global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderServiceExtensions.GetRequiredService<global::AdminPolicy>(sp);
                case "Premium": return (global::ZeroAlloc.Authorization.IAuthorizationPolicy)global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderServiceExtensions.GetRequiredService<global::PremiumPolicy>(sp);
                default: throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException("Unknown policy '" + name + "'");
            }
        }

        public static global::System.Type[] PolicyTypes { get; } = new global::System.Type[]
        {
            typeof(global::AdminPolicy),
            typeof(global::PremiumPolicy),
        };
    }
}

// ===== next file =====
// GeneratedAuthorizationDIExtensions.g.cs
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace ZeroAlloc.Mediator.Authorization
{
    internal static class GeneratedAuthorizationDIExtensions
    {
        public static void RegisterDiscoveredPolicies(global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services)
        {
            global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionServiceExtensions.AddScoped<global::AdminPolicy>(services);
            global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionServiceExtensions.AddScoped<global::PremiumPolicy>(services);
        }
    }
}

// ===== next file =====
// GeneratedAuthorizationModuleInitializer.g.cs
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;

namespace ZeroAlloc.Mediator.Authorization
{
    internal static class GeneratedAuthorizationModuleInitializer
    {
        [ModuleInitializer]
        internal static void Init()
        {
            global::ZeroAlloc.Mediator.Authorization.MediatorAuthorizationGeneratedHooks.Configure(
                registerDiscoveredPolicies: global::ZeroAlloc.Mediator.Authorization.GeneratedAuthorizationDIExtensions.RegisterDiscoveredPolicies,
                getPolicyTypes: static () => global::ZeroAlloc.Mediator.Authorization.GeneratedAuthorizationLookup.PolicyTypes,
                getPoliciesForRequestType: global::ZeroAlloc.Mediator.Authorization.GeneratedAuthorizationLookup.GetPoliciesForType,
                resolvePolicy: global::ZeroAlloc.Mediator.Authorization.GeneratedAuthorizationLookup.Resolve);
        }
    }
}
